text: A street scene in an urban area, likely India. A white sedan is parked on the right side of the road. The background features a mix of buildings: a tall, light-colored building on the left with scaffolding and a large poster, and a pink building on the right with decorative metal grilles on the windows and two air conditioning units. Several people are visible near the entrance of the pink building, and a person is sitting on the ground near the left building.
